raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX of XXXX I received a call from AMEX on evening and they questioned me if an attempted charge was valid ... ..company called XXXX XXXX. 
I said absolutely not valid. Amex said ok we will stop the charge and freeze that card and send you a new one. I said ok. 
A month later they put the charges for {$500.00} and {$1000.00} back on my account. That is {$1500.00}. 
I asked them why this happened and they never have an answer. 
I told them if you call the number on the charges it is disconnected. So stop putting these charges on my card!
